highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 2.88.7 reverts the libjpeg-turbo 3.0.0 bump to restore JPEG decoding compatibility.

bullets.lead: libjpeg-turbo reverted to the pre-3.0 version
bullets.detail: The libjpeg-turbo 3.0.0 bump from 2.88.6 caused regressions for some JPEGs and is reverted in this release.
